title: Delaying a deal on the EU’s next budget won’t make it easier to close, lead MEP says
summary_full: “Beneficiaries need certainty, and the sooner we agree on the budget, the more certainty they have,” said MFF co-rapporteur Siegfried Mureșan
summary_public: “Beneficiaries need certainty, and the sooner we agree on the budget, the more certainty they have,” said MFF co-rapporteur Siegfried Mureșan
